title: Intense Japanese Purple Sprouting Broccoli Roast
description: Roasted purple sprouting broccoli tossed in a savory tamari-ginger glaze, served hot for a quick, jain-friendly dinner.
instructions: Place trimmed purple sprouting broccoli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over the broccoli and toss to coat.
In a small bowl, whisk together 1 tablespoon tamari, 1 teaspoon rice vinegar, grated ginger, and brown sugar until sugar dissolves.
Pour the sauce mixture over the broccoli and toss again until evenly coated.
Sprinkle sea salt and black pepper to taste, then scatter toasted sesame seeds over the top.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, turning once halfway through, until the broccoli is tender and slightly caramelized.
Remove from oven, let rest 2 minutes, then serve hot.
